stride.control_or_reason: structural-contract test pins SKILL.md shape + output-path allow-list
verified-scope report records every assumption / bound / stub / solver / command
per-harness runtime budget + bound caps from research thresholds (arrays 8-16, vecs 0-2)
output-path constraint: harnesses in target crate src/ + reports in docs/slo/verify/ only; no host-config writes
version-pinned tools.toml; prereq cascade refuses mismatch
cargo install --locked (lockfile-fixed deps) + pinned kani-verifier version
prereq cascade refuses to run on missing / mismatched toolchain
subprocess runs with the user's existing cargo perms; no escalation introduced
#[cfg(kani)] gating: harnesses never enter release/test builds
small-bound defaults prevent solver state explosion
honesty gate: no green claim without an explicit scope block (bounds/assumptions/stubs)
report is the durable audit trail of what was and was not proved

abuse_cases.attack_step: Plant code that makes a vacuous harness pass (over-strong assume, unreachable assertions) so a bug ships marked proved
abuse_cases.control: kani::cover! anti-vacuity sanity checks mandated in harness-gen reference; honesty gate rejects green without cover evidence on weak harnesses

abuse_cases.attack_step: Claim concurrency / data-race / async correctness verified from a sequential-kernel proof
abuse_cases.control: Hard gate: skill REFUSES to claim concurrency scope; await/atomics/threads route to extract-sequential-kernel or out-of-scope per research report

abuse_cases.attack_step: Introduce an under-approximating (unsound) stub to make an expensive proof terminate green
abuse_cases.attacker_outcome: Hide a real failure behind a fake model
abuse_cases.control: Stubbing reference mandates over-approximating, behaviourally-safe stubs only; every stub recorded in the scope report; unsound stub = rejected finding

abuse_cases.attack_step: Serve a tampered kani-verifier build or a different version than intended
abuse_cases.attacker_outcome: Run attacker code in dev/CI under cargo
abuse_cases.control: cargo install --locked + version pin in tools.toml; prereq cascade verifies cargo kani --version matches pin before any run

abuse_cases.attack_step: Coerce the skill to write a harness outside the target crate (e.g. into host config)
abuse_cases.control: Output-path allow-list (harnesses inside target crate src/; reports inside docs/slo/verify/); structural-contract test asserts the constraint

residual_risks.risk: Bounded proofs are not unbounded proofs
residual_risks.exploit_path: A green Kani result at N=8 says nothing about N=9; a consumer could read the scope report's green as a total guarantee
residual_risks.compensating_control: Scope report always states the bound; honesty gate forbids whole-system language. Inherent to bounded model checking; disclosed not eliminated.

residual_risks.risk: skills/slo-kani/references/ files are NOT SHA-pinned by sldo-install
residual_risks.exploit_path: Local tamper of a reference file weakens harness-gen or honesty guidance; next session follows weakened guidance
residual_risks.compensating_control: Structural-contract test on SKILL.md + code review. Same residual the SAST pack documents. Re-evaluate if reference-file pinning is added pack-wide.

compliance.control: Subprocess + toolchain integrity (pinned version, cargo install --locked)
Verdict derived from cargo kani output, not LLM narration
compliance.asvs: V5.4 Output Encoding — no code-interpreter context
